prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AWNING-CLAMPS-9620AC Product Type: TARP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 4PC Awning Clamps with Hooks for Tents Blankets Sailing Camping Tarp Description: The ASR Outdoor 4PC Awning Clamps with Hooks provides an extra tying option by attaching clamps to tarp edges. They are handy for many outdoor activities, including sailing, camping, hiking, etc. Great for securing tarps, blankets, and tents down, our awning clamps make a useful addition to your camp gear or emergency pack. You can use them to cover and store items to protect them from the weather. The bright orange color is useful to quickly identify the clamps in case of an emergency so you do not lose them.

How to Use:
1. Place tarp between clamp and fastener.
2. Twist clamp to receive fastener with the tarp.
3. Snap together to secure. Search Terms: activities sailing camping hiking blanket Features: - SECURE - The clamps are easy to fasten securely onto any part of your tarp. - DURABLE - They are durable and will not rip. You can depend on them when especially needed to secure tents, hold down and cover items in harsh weather conditions, and more. - EASY TO FIND - They are bright orange colored. You can easily spot the high Visibility Color. - MULTI-USE - You can use them for boats, RVs, camping, and yard work. - OUTDOOR ACTIVITIES - This item is great for hiking, camping, outdoors. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Orange Awning Clamps with Hooks

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pk Orange Awning Clamps With Hooks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Secure Tarp Clamps, Camping And Sailing Gear, High Visibility Orange, Multi-Use, Durable

openai.title_differentiation: High Visibility Orange, Secure Tarp Edge Grip, Durable Weather Resistant, Multi Use Camping Sailing RV
